Title: Successful User Registration with Valid Data
Preconditions:
- User is on the registration page.
- Network connection is stable.
Test Data:
- Name: "John Doe"
- Cognome: "Smith"
- Email: "john.smith@example.com"
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Photo: Valid URI (e.g., "https://example.com/photo.jpg")
- Neighborhood: "NYC123" (valid Google code)
Test Steps:
1. Enter all test data into the registration form.
2. Submit the form.
3. System redirects to authentication step.
4. Verify email confirmation (if applicable).
5. Authenticate with the provided credentials.
6. Verify localization procedure runs (e.g., GPS/geocode validation).
Expected Result:
- User account is created successfully.
- User is authenticated and localized to the correct neighborhood.
- Home screen loads with profile, notifications, and dashboard sections.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: - User is on the registration page.
Test Data:
- Name: "Jane Doe"
- Cognome: "Johnson"
- Email: "invalid.email" (missing @ and domain)
- Password: "Pass123"
- Photo: Valid URI
- Neighborhood: "LA456"
Test Steps:
1. Enter all test data into the registration form.
2. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: "Invalid email format."
- User remains on the registration page.
- No account is created.

Title: User Registration with Duplicate Email
Preconditions: - A user with email "duplicate@example.com" already exists.
Test Data:
- Name: "Duplicate User"
- Cognome: "Tester"
- Email: "duplicate@example.com"
- Password: "Pass123"
- Photo: Valid URI
- Neighborhood: "SF789"
Test Steps:
1. Enter test data into the registration form.
2. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: "Email already registered."
- User remains on the registration page.
- No duplicate account is created.

Title: Successful User Authentication
Test Steps:
1. Enter credentials on the login page.
2. Submit the form.
3. System verifies credentials.
Expected Result:
- User is authenticated successfully.
- System proceeds to localization verification.
- Home screen loads with profile, notifications, and dashboard.

Title: Failed Authentication with Incorrect Password
Test Steps:
1. Enter credentials on the login page.
2. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: "Invalid email or password."
- User remains on the login page.
- No authentication occurs.

Title: Successful Neighborhood Localization
Preconditions:
- User is authenticated.
- Device GPS/geolocation is enabled.
Test Steps:
1. User authenticates.
2. System triggers localization verification.
3. GPS/geocode confirms "NYC123".
Expected Result:
- User is localized to "NYC123" neighborhood.
- Home screen loads with neighborhood-specific content.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Localization Failure Due to Invalid Geocode
Preconditions:
- User is authenticated.
- Device GPS is disabled or returns invalid geocode.
Test Steps:
1. User authenticates.
2. System triggers localization verification.
3. Geocode returns "INVALID123".
Expected Result:
- System displays error: "Unable to verify your location. Please enable GPS or check your connection."
- User is prompted to manually select a neighborhood.
- Home screen loads with a generic neighborhood or error state.

Title: Access User Profile from Home Screen
Preconditions: - User is authenticated and on the Home screen.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Profile" icon in the navigation menu.
2. System navigates to the Profile section.
Expected Result:
- Profile screen loads with:
  - User’s name, cognome, photo, and email.
  - Linked ChatList (empty or with contacts).
  - Neighborhood association ("NYC123").
- No errors occur.

Title: Access Chat Section from Profile
Preconditions:
- User is on the Profile screen.
- User has at least one chat in ChatList.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Chat" section in the Profile screen.
2. System navigates to the ChatSection.
Expected Result:
- ChatSection loads with:
  - List of chatted users (e.g., ["Alice", "Bob"]).
  - Option to start a new chat.
- No errors occur.

Title: Create a New Post as a User
Preconditions: - User is authenticated and on the GeneralDashboard.
Test Data:
- Post type: "Announcement"
- Content: "Neighborhood meeting tomorrow at 5 PM."
- Neighborhood: "NYC123" (auto-assigned).
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Create Post" button on GeneralDashboard.
2. User selects post type ("Announcement") and enters content.
3. User submits the post.
Expected Result:
- Post is created with:
  - `author`: Current user.
  - `postType`: "Announcement".
  - `creationDate`: Current timestamp.
  - `neighborhood`: "NYC123".
- Post appears in the user’s profile and neighborhood feed.
- `lastUpdateDate` is set to `creationDate`.

Title: Create a Post with Empty Content
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Create Post."
2. User selects post type but leaves content empty.
3. User submits the post.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: "Post content cannot be empty."
- Post is not created.
- User remains on the post creation screen.

Title: Add a Comment to a Post
Preconditions:
- A post exists with ID `123`.
- User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the post (ID `123`) in FullScreenPost.
2. User clicks "LeaveComment."
3. User enters comment content and submits.
4. System shows "Attendi salvataggio" (saving) state.
Expected Result:
- Comment is created with:
  - `id`: Auto-generated (e.g., `456`).
  - `content`: "Great announcement!".
  - `author`: Current user.
  - `creationDate`: Current timestamp.
  - `postReference`: Post with ID `123`.
- Comment appears under the post.
- "Attendi salvataggio" state disappears after saving.

Title: Add a Comment with Special Characters
Preconditions:
- A post exists.
- User is authenticated.
Test Data: - Comment content: "Hello! 😊 This is a test: 123 #tag @user."
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the post.
2. User enters comment with special characters and submits.
Expected Result:
- Comment is saved successfully.
- Special characters (emojis, symbols, hashtags) are preserved.
- No error or truncation occurs.

Title: Add a Comment as a Business User
Preconditions:
- A post exists.
- Business user is authenticated with:
  - `brandName`: "Acme Corp"
  - `companyName`: "Acme Inc."
Test Data: - Comment content: "Thanks for your support! Visit us at Acme Corp."
Test Steps:
1. Business user navigates to the post.
2. Business user adds a comment.
Expected Result:
- Comment is created with:
  - `author`: BusinessUser object (linked to User).
  - `content`: Includes brand/company info (if system auto-appends).
- Comment appears with business user’s brand photo (if available).

Title: Access Business Profile Features
Test Steps:
1. Business user navigates to their profile.
2. User clicks "ViewPromotions."
3. User clicks "ViewUnSold" (items for sale).
4. User clicks "Prenota appuntamento" (schedule appointment).
Expected Result:
- Promotions section loads with business-specific promotions.
- Unsold items section loads with inventory.
- Calendar integration opens for appointment scheduling.
- No errors occur during navigation.

Title: Schedule an Appointment via Business Profile
Preconditions:
- Business user has a Calendar integrated.
- Appointment slots are available.
Test Steps:
1. Business user clicks "Prenota appuntamento."
2. User selects date/time from the Calendar.
3. User confirms the appointment.
Expected Result:
- Appointment is scheduled in the Calendar.
- Business profile updates with confirmed appointment.
- User receives a confirmation (e.g., email or in-app notification).

Title: Start a Chat with Another User
Preconditions:
- User A and User B are authenticated.
- User A’s ChatList contains User B.
Test Steps:
1. User A navigates to ChatSection.
2. User A selects User B from the chattedWith list.
3. User A sends a message: "Hello!"
Expected Result:
- Chat window opens between User A and User B.
- Message "Hello!" is displayed in the chat.
- User B’s ChatList updates to include User A (if not already present).

Title: Chat with Non-Existent User
Preconditions:
- User A is authenticated.
- User B does not exist in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User A searches for User B in the ChatSection.
2. User A attempts to start a chat with User B.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: "User not found."
- Chat is not initiated.
